dashboard.upToDate: Aapka health profile up to date hai.
dashboard.noReports: Abhi tak koi report scan nahi hui.

upload.title: Apna Clinical Data Safely Upload Karo
upload.subtitle: Processing ke liye apne medical records add karo. Hum PDF, PNG, JPG aur JPEG formats support karte hain. Aapka data encrypted aur safe hai.
upload.comfortLang: AI clinical summary ke liye apni pasandida language chuno.
upload.privacyDesc: Files HIPAA-compliant hain aur extraction ke baad automatically delete ho jaati hain.
upload.uploadFile: Please kam se kam ek file upload karo.

predict.title: Health Predictions
predict.subtitle: Turant AI-powered health risk assessment lo. Ek condition select karo aur apne health parameters enter karo.
predict.enterParams: Neeche apne health parameters enter karo
predict.askAIResults: AI se Results ke Baare Mein Pucho
predict.step2: Hamara ML model data analyze karta hai
predict.heartDesc: Cleveland Heart Disease dataset ke basis pe 13 clinical parameters se heart disease ki possibility predict karta hai.
predict.diabetesDesc: Pima Indians Diabetes dataset ke 8 health indicators se diabetes risk predict karta hai.
predict.kidneyDesc: UCI CKD dataset ke 24 clinical features se chronic kidney disease predict karta hai.
predict.cbcDesc: 5 key blood markers se CBC data se anemia predict karta hai.

specialist.title: Specialist Directory
specialist.subtitle: Yahan aapke liye recommended doctors ki details hain. Doctors ki contact info aur clinic locations dekh kar apna treatment plan karein.
specialist.searchPlaceholder: Naam, clinic ya bimari se search karo...
specialist.nearbyDesc: Aapke paas ke real-time hospitals aur clinics. Doosre areas explore karne ke liye map drag karo.
specialist.contactDesc: Madad chahiye? Hamari support line pe call karo +91 800-CLINIC.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Apni clinical reports ke baare mein pucho ya feedback do
aiChat.greeting: Hello! Main aapka Health Saathi AI assistant hoon. Main aapki medical reports samajhne mein, health questions ka jawab dene mein, ya general health guidance mein help kar sakta hoon. Aaj main aapki kaise help kar sakta hoon?
aiChat.placeholder: Apne health ya reports ke baare mein pucho...

landing.heroSubtitle: Complex blood reports, imaging scans aur prescriptions ko seconds mein clear, actionable insights mein badlo.
landing.hipaaDesc: Saare clinical data ke liye encrypted, private aur secure storage.
landing.precisionDesc: Hum Health Saathi AI ke through sabhi clinical document formats mein structural aur technical clarity provide karte hain.
landing.bloodAnalysisDesc: CBC, metabolic panels aur lipid profiles ko visual benchmarks ke saath samajhne yogya trends mein badlo.
landing.prescriptionsDesc: AI-powered drug interaction checks aur simplified dosage schedules for clarity.
landing.healthPredictionsDesc: Trained ML models dwara Heart, Diabetes, Kidney Disease aur CBC analysis.
landing.xrayDesc: Radiographic findings ka automated summarization, key bone aur tissue observations highlight karta hai.
landing.ctaTitle: Clarity ki Duniya mein Kadam Rakho
landing.ctaSubtitle: Aaj apni pehli report upload karo aur medical document management ka future experience karo.
landing.footerDesc: Medical diagnostic data ke liye high-end editorial experience. Jab aapko sabse zyada zarurat ho tab clarity.

reportInsights.title: Report Insights
reportInsights.noReportTitle: Abhi Koi Report Analyze Nahi Hui
reportInsights.noReportDesc: AI analysis results dekhne ke liye medical document ya X-ray upload karein.
reportInsights.subtitleXray: Aapke Chest X-Ray ka detailed analysis. Humne apni clinical AI ke through data process kar liya hai.
reportInsights.subtitleMed: Aapki Medical Report ka detailed analysis. Humne apni clinical AI ke through data process kar liya hai.
reportInsights.askAI: AI se Results ke baare mein pucho
reportInsights.recommendedDesc: Aapke results ke basis pe, hum specialist consult karne ki salah dete hain.

dietPlan.title: Targeted Diet Plan
dietPlan.subtitle: Aapke sabse recent clinical analysis ke aadhar par personalized nutrition.
dietPlan.noContextDesc: Accurate aur medically-safe diet plan generate karne ke liye, please pehle apni report ya X-Ray analyze karein.
dietPlan.craftingPlan: Aapka personalized plan ban raha hai...
dietPlan.analyzingContext: Biomedical context analyze ho raha hai.
dietPlan.failed: Diet plan generate karne mein error aaya.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Apne account preferences, notifications aur privacy settings manage karein.
settings.passwordDesc: Theek ek saal pehle change hua tha
settings.emailAlertsDesc: Nayi medical reports ke liye email payein
settings.smsRecapsDesc: Weekly checkups ke liye SMS alerts payein
settings.aiSuggestionsDesc: Aapki profile ke aadhar par personalized wellness routines
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Apna Health Saathi data hamesha ke liye mita dein.

specialistDir.pageSubtitle: Yahan aapke liye recommended doctors hain. Treatment plan karne ke liye contact info aur location dekho.
specialistDir.searchPlaceholder: Naam, clinic ya bimari se search karein...
specialistDir.nearbyDesc: Aapke aaspaas ke real-time hospitals aur clinics.
